delegations.task_goal: Locate existing APP-244 write-precheck UI/data flow and minimal implementation points.
delegations.validation_expectation: Identify existing UI, minimal files, smoke extension, and risks.
delegations.output_format: Summary with file locators and risks.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller integrated task reachability, live Core mapping, and smoke coverage.

delegations.task_goal: Add bounded smoke assertions for APP-244 write-precheck display strings.
delegations.validation_expectation: npm run typecheck; npm run smoke
delegations.output_format: Changed paths, validation result, residual risk.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller retained the smoke additions and extended the same file with live Core write-precheck mapping checks.

delegations.task_goal: Fix live Core write-precheck mapping so unsafe or ambiguous states fail closed and smoke covers XHS/BOSS live projections.
delegations.validation_expectation: git diff --check; npm run typecheck; npm run smoke
delegations.output_format: Changed paths, validation result, residual risk.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller retained the fail-closed mapping, added dynamic submitted label UI wiring, and refreshed APP-244 carriers.

integration_evidence.summary: Task Thread list and Library CTA now include Xiaohongshu/BOSS write-precheck tasks.
Core live write-precheck projection maps preview_result/action refs/evidence/session/failure states into existing writePrecheck and approval UI fields.

Core live preview_unavailable, generic failed/blocked, submitted=true, and missing submitted states now render as blocked rather than pending approval; submitted=false / 未提交 is displayed only when Core owner truth explicitly reports false.
